message:
feat(core): intelligent snapshot scheduling config (wa-3kxe)

Add SnapshotSchedulingConfig and SnapshotSchedulingMode to the config
module, enabling event/value-driven snapshot scheduling alongside the
existing fixed-interval (periodic) mode.

SnapshotSchedulingMode:
- Periodic: legacy fixed-interval scheduling (backward compatible)
- Intelligent: event/value-driven scheduling with periodic fallback
  (new default)

SnapshotSchedulingConfig:
- mode: scheduling mode selector
- snapshot_threshold: cumulative value sum needed to trigger capture
- Per-event value contributions: work_completed_value,
  state_transition_value, idle_window_value, memory_pressure_value
- These knobs allow operators to tune snapshot frequency based on
  workload characteristics rather than fixed wall-clock intervals

Defaults to Intelligent mode, providing smarter capture timing that
reduces unnecessary snapshots during idle periods while ensuring
state-changing events are promptly captured.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
